name: icassp-skills
description: A 12-skill depth pack for ICASSP submissions across the full signal-processing spectrum: venue routing, the IEEE 4+1 format, single-blind submission on the CMS portal, the recently added rebuttal, IEEE Xplore camera-ready, task-matched evaluation, reproducibility, supplementary media, and workflow. Grounded in the ICASSP 2026 (Barcelona) paper kit and ICASSP 2027 (Toronto) call, the IEEE Signal Processing Society policies, and dblp/IEEE Xplore, checked on 2026-07-09.
